idx_log_dedup_bodyhash.name: idx_log_dedup_bodyhash
idx_log_dedup_bodyhash.where: body_sha256 IS NOT NULL AND body_dedup_applied = true

chk_inbound_domain_ownership.name: chk_inbound_domain_ownership
chk_inbound_domain_ownership.value: ("inbound_domains"."kind" = 'shared' and "inbound_domains"."organization_id" is null) or ("inbound_domains"."kind" = 'custom' and "inbound_domains"."organization_id" is not null)
